en: This was supposed to be a sketch about me just getting a package, and that guy was supposed to come in
ko: This was supposed to be a sketch about me just getting a package, and that guy was supposed to come in

en: and act like just a regular, ordinary UPS man.
ko: and act like just a regular, ordinary UPS man.

en: Instead, he acted like a raving jackass.
ko: Instead, he acted like a raving jackass.

en: He was totally unrealistic. Can we get Naomi, our casting person in here, please?
ko: He was totally unrealistic. Can we get Naomi, our casting person in here, please?

en: Oh, good. Naomi, there you are. Why did you cast that actor to play the messenger?
ko: Oh, good. Naomi, there you are. Why did you cast that actor to play the messenger?

en: I mean, he was horrible. I'm sorry, Conan.
ko: I mean, he was horrible. I'm sorry, Conan.

en: I tried to do the best job that I could,
ko: I tried to do the best job that I could,

en: but I guess my best wasn't good enough.
ko: but I guess my best wasn't good enough.

en: Why have I failed where others have succeeded?
ko: Why have I failed where others have succeeded?
